mapper.select:
select * from( select notice_topic.id topicId, notice_topic.name topicName, notice_topic.code topicCode, stuff( ( select ',' + CAST(notice_tmpl.id as varchar(100)) from notice_topic nt left join notice_topic_tmpl_rel on notice_topic_tmpl_rel.notice_topic_id = nt.id left join notice_tmpl on notice_topic_tmpl_rel.notice_tmpl_id = notice_tmpl.id where notice_topic.id = nt.id for xml path('') ), 1, 1, '' ) templateIds, stuff( ( select ',' + CAST(notice_topic_range.id as varchar(100)) from notice_topic nt left join notice_topic_range on notice_topic_range.notice_topic_id = nt.id where notice_topic.id = nt.id for xml path('') ), 1, 1, '' ) rangeIds, ROW_NUMBER() over(order by notice_topic.id desc ) ROW_ID from notice_topic left join notice_topic_tmpl_rel on notice_topic_tmpl_rel.notice_topic_id = notice_topic.id left join notice_tmpl on notice_topic_tmpl_rel.notice_tmpl_id = notice_tmpl.id left join notice_protocol on notice_protocol.id = notice_tmpl.notice_protocol_id left join notice_topic_range on notice_topic_range.notice_topic_id = notice_topic.id
notice_topic.name like ('%' + #{name} + '%')
notice_topic.code like ('%' + #{code} + '%')
notice_tmpl.name like ('%' + #{templateName} + '%')
and notice_topic.notice_topic_type_id = #{topicTree}
notice_protocol.id = #{protocolId}
group by notice_topic.id, notice_topic.name, notice_topic.code) a where a.ROW_ID BETWEEN (${start}+1) and (${start}+${end}-1)

select count (1) from ( select count (1) as count from notice_topic left join notice_topic_tmpl_rel on notice_topic_tmpl_rel.notice_topic_id = notice_topic.id left join notice_tmpl on notice_topic_tmpl_rel.notice_tmpl_id = notice_tmpl.id left join notice_protocol on notice_protocol.id = notice_tmpl.notice_protocol_id left join notice_topic_range on notice_topic_range.notice_topic_id = notice_topic.id
notice_topic.name like ('%' + #{name} + '%')
notice_topic.code like ('%' + #{code} + '%')
notice_tmpl.name like ('%' + #{templateName} + '%')
and notice_topic.notice_topic_type_id = #{topicTree}
notice_protocol.id = #{protocolId}
group by notice_topic.id, notice_topic.name, notice_topic.code ) a
